ItacPersonItem.Notes: Firenze 1569 - 1598; Venezia 1566 - 1581. Active both in Florence and Venice; Filippo`s brothers were Iacopo The Younger, resident in Florence like Filippo, and Bernardo The Younger, who worked in Venice.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
